rationale: Removed the Ctrl/Cmd+V keydown interception so unsupported clipboard reads no longer block native paste delivery.
Top-level automated review wrapper only; the actionable inline feedback is tracked and handled separately.
Keyboard paste now relies on the browser paste event, keeping clipboard-read permissions only for the explicit toolbar action.
Replaced the obsolete Ctrl+V test with a regression asserting the shortcut is left unhandled for the native paste event path.
Summary review comment with no separate actionable request beyond the inline feedback already addressed.
Removed the superseded --mm-executing-sweep-duration and --mm-executing-sweep-delay variables so the stylesheet keeps only the active cycle-duration contract.
Dropped the obsolete CSS test expectations for the removed duration and delay tokens so the suite reflects the active shimmer contract only.
Simplified the single-quoted selector string literal to remove unnecessary escaped double quotes.
Top-level review summary only; its actionable items were handled through the inline review comments above.
Handled the no-WebGL DOM fallback path as a successful initialization so the hook no longer retries after liquidGL returns fallback elements without calling on.init.
HTMLElement targets are now translated into a temporary selector before calling the vendor library, preserving hook support without passing an invalid target type into liquidGL.
Top-level bot review summary only; the actionable inline comments from this review were addressed separately.
The hook now marks DOM fallback returns as initialized immediately, which stops false stall teardown and retry loops for fallback clients.
The hook no longer forwards HTMLElement targets directly to the vendor API and now verifies that adapter path with a focused test.
Top-level bot review summary only; the actionable inline comments from this review were addressed separately.
Split the long pseudo-selector assertion into a named predicate and standalone expectation in mission-control.test.tsx.
Reworked the awaiting_external check to assert directly against rendered status-pill hosts instead of a conditional closest() lookup that could skip coverage.
Applied the same direct rendered-host assertion strategy to finalizing pills so the regression guard cannot silently pass.
Top-level review summary only; the actionable items are tracked and addressed by the three inline review comments above.
